mapper.select:
SELECT ID, INVOICE_ID, BUSINESS_TYPE, ORDER_NUM, COUNT, ORDER_CHANNEL, ORDER_DATE, INVOICE_TYPE_CODE, TYPE_CODE, SPECIAL_INVOICE_MARK, TAX_INCLUSIVE_PRICE_MARK, TAX_MARK, REQUEST_TYPE, BUYER_MOBILE_NUM, BUYER_EMAIL, BUYER_WE_CHAT, BUYER_MEMBER_ID, TAX_EXCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT, TAX_TOTAL_AMOUNT, TAX_INCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT, NOTE, DEDUCTION, PAYEE, CHECKER, INVOICE_CLERK, INFO_FORM_NUM, APPLICATION_FORM_CODE, ORIGINAL_INVOICE_CODE, ORIGINAL_INVOICE_NO, ORIGINAL_ISSUE_DATE, BUYER_NATURE, BUYER_TAX_ID, BUYER_NAME, BUYER_ADDR_TEL, BUYER_TEL, BUYER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT, BUYER_ACCOUNT, SELLER_TAX_ID, SELLER_NAME, SELLER_ADDR_TEL, SELLER_TEL, SELLER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT, SELLER_ACCOUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_SD_INVOICE_QUERY
id = #{id}

SELECT ID, INVOICE_ID, BUSINESS_TYPE, ORDER_NUM, COUNT, ORDER_CHANNEL, ORDER_DATE, INVOICE_TYPE_CODE, TYPE_CODE, SPECIAL_INVOICE_MARK, TAX_INCLUSIVE_PRICE_MARK, TAX_MARK, REQUEST_TYPE BUYER_MOBILE_NUM, BUYER_EMAIL, BUYER_WE_CHAT, BUYER_MEMBER_ID, TAX_EXCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT, TAX_TOTAL_AMOUNT, TAX_INCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT, NOTE, DEDUCTION, PAYEE, CHECKER, INVOICE_CLERK, INFO_FORM_NUM, APPLICATION_FORM_CODE, ORIGINAL_INVOICE_CODE, ORIGINAL_INVOICE_NO, ORIGINAL_ISSUE_DATE, BUYER_NATURE, BUYER_TAX_ID, BUYER_NAME, BUYER_ADDR_TEL, BUYER_TEL, BUYER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT, BUYER_ACCOUNT, SELLER_TAX_ID, SELLER_NAME, SELLER_ADDR_TEL, SELLER_TEL, SELLER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT, SELLER_ACCOUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_SD_INVOICE_QUERY
INVOICE_ID = #{invoiceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_SD_INVOICE_QUERY(ID, INVOICE_ID, BUSINESS_TYPE, ORDER_NUM, COUNT, ORDER_CHANNEL, ORDER_DATE, INVOICE_TYPE_CODE, TYPE_CODE, SPECIAL_INVOICE_MARK, TAX_INCLUSIVE_PRICE_MARK, TAX_MARK, REQUEST_TYPE, BUYER_MOBILE_NUM, BUYER_EMAIL, BUYER_WE_CHAT, BUYER_MEMBER_ID, TAX_EXCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT, TAX_TOTAL_AMOUNT, TAX_INCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT, NOTE, DEDUCTION, PAYEE, CHECKER, INVOICE_CLERK, INFO_FORM_NUM, APPLICATION_FORM_CODE, ORIGINAL_INVOICE_CODE, ORIGINAL_INVOICE_NO, ORIGINAL_ISSUE_DATE, BUYER_NATURE, BUYER_TAX_ID, BUYER_NAME, BUYER_ADDR_TEL, BUYER_TEL, BUYER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT, BUYER_ACCOUNT, SELLER_TAX_ID, SELLER_NAME, SELLER_ADDR_TEL, SELLER_TEL, SELLER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT, SELLER_ACCOUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{businessType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{count, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderChannel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{typeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specialInvoiceMark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxInclusivePriceMark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxMark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerMobileNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerWeChat, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerMemberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxExclusiveTotalAmount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxTotalAmount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxInclusiveTotalAmount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{note, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deduction, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payee, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{checker, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceClerk, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{infoFormNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationFormCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{originalInvoiceCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{originalInvoiceNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{originalIssueDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerNature, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerTaxId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerAddrTel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerTel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerFinancialAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellerTaxId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellerAddrTel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellerTel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellerFinancialAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellerAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_SD_INVOICE_QUERY SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_ID = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUSINESS_TYPE = #{businessType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORDER_NUM = #{orderNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COUNT = #{count,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORDER_CHANNEL = #{orderChannel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORDER_DATE = #{orderDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_TYPE_CODE = #{invoiceTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TYPE_CODE = #{typeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPECIAL_INVOICE_MARK = #{specialInvoiceMark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_INCLUSIVE_PRICE_MARK = #{taxInclusivePriceMark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_MARK = #{taxMark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REQUEST_TYPE = #{requestType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_MOBILE_NUM = #{buyerMobileNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_EMAIL = #{buyerEmail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_WE_CHAT = #{buyerWeChat,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_MEMBER_ID = #{buyerMemberId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_EXCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT = #{taxExclusiveTotalAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_TOTAL_AMOUNT = #{taxTotalAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_INCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT = #{taxInclusiveTotalAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOTE = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEDUCTION = #{deduction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYEE = #{payee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHECKER = #{checker,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_CLERK = #{invoiceClerk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INFO_FORM_NUM = #{infoFormNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPLICATION_FORM_CODE = #{applicationFormCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORIGINAL_INVOICE_CODE = #{originalInvoiceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORIGINAL_INVOICE_NO = #{originalInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORIGINAL_ISSUE_DATE = #{originalIssueDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_NATURE = #{buyerNature,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_TAX_ID = #{buyerTaxId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_NAME = #{buyerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_ADDR_TEL = #{buyerAddrTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_TEL = #{buyerTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT = #{buyerFinancialAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_ACCOUNT = #{buyerAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SELLER_TAX_ID = #{sellerTaxId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SELLER_NAME = #{sellerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SELLER_ADDR_TEL = #{sellerAddrTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SELLER_TEL = #{sellerTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SELLER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT = #{sellerFinancialAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SELLER_ACCOUNT = #{sellerAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
